name: Shaman Spirit Society
subtitle: Any Shamans AIG/RQG etc

requirements.initiate: to have 5 cult skills at 50%+ one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity. Examiners need to be convinced at 3 of them.

Localities: Blue Moon Plateau, Dagori Inkarth, Elder Wilds, Errinoru Jungle, Fronela, Halikiv, Jrusteli
Isles, Keniryan Sea, Koromondol, Pavis, Tarmo Mountains, Valinds Glacier, Yolp Mountains,Elder
